prompt: A first-person POV shot of a romantic dinner date with a Minecraft Creeper. The scene is set in a romantic dimly lit restaurant with warm ambient lighting and a blurred background showing other tables and a window looking out into the night. The character is sitting directly across the table. Around its head are 7 floating 8-bit red hearts. On the wooden table between the viewer and the character, there is a red and white checkered placemat. On it sits a voxel-style plate containing a blocky steak with red and green garnish. To the left is a blocky, transparent wine glass filled with red wine. To the right is a blocky red rose in a transparent blocky vase. There are 2 glowing blocky candles in wooden holders on the table. The foreground shows the blurred edge of the viewer's own matching plate of food. The entire image blends realistic cinematic lighting and depth of field with voxel-based, 3D pixel-art objects.
